_comment: Pipe (9c) + Weld (9a) overlap: split cube edge 0 (v_0 ↔ v_3) at midpoint, then bevel BOTH resulting collinear halves. The midpoint has selCount=2 valence=2 (weld) AND the two bev edges are collinear (pipe). Works without dedicated Weld/Pipe spec-case code thanks to a robust faceNormal (Newell's method): the offsetMeet's parallel-edge fallback gives the correct in-face perpendicular as long as the face normal isn't degenerate.
